name: shoreclean-gdg
description: Shoreclean - gdg - Coastal cleanup management platform
author: ShoreClean GDG Team

scripts.install-all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server/src && npm install && cd ../../ai-server && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:ai"
